rag_rules: Guarantee statements must be placed in component type scopes, not implementations
AGREE contracts are enclosed in annex agree blocks
generic_rules: Validate that all identifiers in AGREE contracts are visible in the current scope
Ensure type consistency between assumptions, guarantees, and helper declarations
Avoid generating package-qualified identifiers not present in the model
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes use the syntax: annex agree {** ... **};
Guarantee expressions must be valid in the component type's scope
anti_patterns: Placing guarantee statements in component implementations instead of types
Using identifiers not declared or visible in the current annex
